title: BehaviorValidationResult
description: The result of validating a behavior proposal, including individual check outcomes and overall status.

validation_id.description: Unique identifier for this validation result.

proposal_id.description: The identifier of the behavior proposal that was validated.

check_name.description: The name of the validation check that was performed.

detail.description: A human-readable description of the check result.

checks.description: The list of individual validation checks performed.

validated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when validation was completed.

validator_signer_fingerprint.description: Optional fingerprint of the key used by the validator to sign this result.

algorithm.description: The cryptographic algorithm used for signing.

signer_role.description: The role of the entity that produced this signature.

signature.description: Optional cryptographic signature over this validation result.
